steps.title: Find the defining goal
steps.content: The student wants to emphasize Mauritania's “global rank”—its ranking compared to other countries. This appears in the notes as “the thirty-fourth-largest under-fifteen population in the world.” The correct answer must include this information.

steps.title: Apply the criterion to the choices
steps.content: Choice A includes Mauritania's global rank (“thirty-fourth highest...in the world”), which directly fulfills the goal. The other choices omit this ranking or shift focus away from Mauritania. That matches choice A — A is correct.
